meta.title: Home Services in Romania | Go2Fix.ro
meta.description: Romania's first home services marketplace. Cleaning, disinfection, plumbing and more. Verified companies, transparent pricing, online payment.

hero.subheadline: We connect clients with verified home service companies in Romania. Book in 2 minutes, pay online, enjoy the result.

categories.title: What services do we offer?
categories.subtitle: Choose the right service category and discover available options.
categories.cleaningDesc: Standard, deep, post-construction cleaning and more.
categories.disinfectionDesc: Professional disinfection for homes and commercial spaces.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to the service you need.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select the service category, type and preferred date.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Confirm the details and place your order. A company will accept quickly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The team comes to you. You relax, we handle the rest.

trust.title: Why Go2Fix?
trust.subtitle: Safety, transparency and quality in every service.

verified.title: Verified companies
verified.desc: All partner companies go through a strict verification and accreditation process.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.desc: Pay online safely. Money reaches the company only after the job is done.

prices.title: Transparent pricing
prices.desc: No hidden costs. You know the final price before confirming your booking.

support.title: Fast support
support.desc: Our team is available to help you with any issue or question.

invoice.title: Automatic invoice
invoice.desc: Electronic invoice issued automatically after every service, compliant with Romanian law.

t1.name: Maria Ionescu
t1.text: I found an excellent company in less than 5 minutes. Impeccable service, I highly recommend!

t2.name: Andrei Popescu
t2.text: The platform is simple and intuitive. I've booked 3 times and each time it was perfect.

t3.name: Elena Dumitrescu
t3.text: Transparent pricing, no unpleasant surprises. The team was punctual and professional.

partners.title: Are you a service company?
partners.subtitle: Join Go2Fix and receive orders from clients across Romania.
partners.step1Desc: Submit your company documents in 5 minutes, directly from the platform.
partners.step2Desc: Our team verifies and activates your account within 24–48 hours.
partners.step3Desc: Clients find you and book directly — you focus on the service.
partners.b1Desc: Receive orders from verified clients in your service area.
partners.b2Desc: Collect online, no hassle with cash or invoices.
partners.b3Desc: Dedicated dashboard for orders, team and client communication.
partners.b4Desc: Platform visibility, reviews and rating to attract more clients.
